candidate_definition_hints.text: Intel MKL linear algebra backend for Julia

MKL.jl is a Julia package that allows users to use the Intel MKL library for Julia's underlying BLAS and LAPACK, instead of OpenBLAS, which Julia ships with by default. Julia includes [libblastrampoline](https://github.com/staticfloat/libblastrampoline), which enables picking a …
